info.name: GRA E-VAT API - VER 8.2
info.description:
This document (GRA E-VAT API Documentation or E-VAT API Documentation or VCIS/VSDC API Documentation) describes the API specification for the integration of Taxpayer systems to the Commissioner-General's Electronic Invoicing Systems (E-VAT). **OVERVIEW** The following specific requirements are for the systems to communicate with E-VAT VCIS, the Certified Invoicing System to be used together with a Virtual Sales Data Controller (VSDC). [Data Flow Diagram](https://gra.evatgra.com/DataFlow.php) **AUTHENTICATION** This API requires an Authentication in the Request Header Example: "SECURITY_KEY": "1234567890987UIEGRTEIIIWOWPPWOOW" **DATA FORMAT** E-VAT API Receives data in; 1. JSON 2. XML **LEVY MAPPING** \* **LEVY_A : NHIL 2.5 %** \* **LEVY_B : GETFL 2.5 %** \* **LEVY_D : CST 5%** \* **LEVY_E : TOURISM 1%** **SPECIAL TAX-EXEMPT TAXPAYER** To serve special tax-exempt taxpayers (taxpayers who are exempted from paying the standard taxes/levies) such as some Mining, Automobile Assembly Plants, etc. Please read more here: [Purchase Order (PO) for Taxpayers Who Have Special Exemptions.](https://evatgra.zendesk.com/hc/en-us/articles/18854227372957-Purchase-Order-PO-for-Taxpayers-Who-Have-Special-Exemptions) **Covid Levy Amendments, Effective “1st January 2026” & The Impending VAT Amendments: E-VAT Implementation Guidelines** [https://docs.google.com/document/d/1fXSlFxoBtmNXDWMoe7-coJ8wBphnwN8s/edit?usp=sharing&ouid=114670877025048538475&rtpof=true&sd=true](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1fXSlFxoBtmNXDWMoe7-coJ8wBphnwN8s/edit?usp=sharing&ouid=114670877025048538475&rtpof=true&sd=true) **EXCEL TEMPLATE OF TAX CALCULATION** [https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1DAcDUBVdoHD7A_yOqMcrzuX4rNc4VGLC/edit?usp=drive_link&ouid=114670877025048538475&rtpof=true&sd=true](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1DAcDUBVdoHD7A_yOqMcrzuX4rNc4VGLC/edit?usp=drive_link&ouid=114670877025048538475&rtpof=true&sd=true) **SAMPLE INVOICE** Sample Invoice - ERP: Sample Invoice - POS: **TAG DESCRIPTIONS** | TAG NAME | TAG VALUE EXAMPLE | TAG DESCRIPTION | LENGTH AND TYPE | MANDATORY | | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | | "currency" | "GHS" | CURRENCY: GHS, USD, EUR or GBP | VARCHAR(20) | YES | | "exchangeRate" | 1 | CURRENT EXCHANGE RATE: DEFAULT 1 FOR GHS | 10 | YES | | "businessPartnerName" | "James Kofi" | CLIENT NAME | VARCHAR(100) | YES | | "invoiceNumber" | "2306219003" | SOFTWARE UNIQUE TRANSACTION IDENTIFIER | VARCHAR(100) | YES | | "totalLevy" | 30 | TOTAL LEVY AMOUNT | NUMERIC | YES | | "userName" | "happy" | USER NAME | VARCHAR(100) | YES | | "flag" | "INVOICE" | TRANSACTION TYPE:
"INVOICE",

"PURCHASE"

"REFUND" For full cancellation of the original invoice

"PARTIAL_REFUND " For partial cancellation of the original invoice

"PURCHASE_RETURN"

"REFUND_CANCELLATION" | VARCHAR(20) | YES | | "calculationType" | "INCLUSIVE" | "INCLUSIVE" or "EXCLUSIVE" | VARCHAR(20) | YES | | "totalVat" | 13.04 | TOTAL VAT OF THE INVOICE | NUMERIC | YES | | "groupReferenceId" | "" | REFERENCE ID TO A GROUP OF INVOICES | VARCHAR(50) | NO | | "transactionDate" | "2023-06-14" | INVOICE DATE (POSTED DATE IS THE ONE USED) | VARCHAR(50) | YES | | "businessPartnerTin" | "VC00000009055" | CLIENT TIN NUMBER | VARCHAR(15) | YES | | "totalAmount" | 100.0 | TOTAL AMOUNT ON THE INVOICE | NUMERIC | YES | | "totalExciseAmount" | "600" | TOTAL EXCISE AMOUNT ON THE INVOICE | NUMERIC | YES if excise duty is applicable. | | "voucherAmount" | 0.0 | VOUCHER AMOUNT | NUMERIC | NO | | "saleType" | "NORMAL" | "NORMAL" - for General case

"EXPORT" - for Export | VARCHAR(20) | YES | | "discountType" | "GENERAL" | "SELECTIVE" if discount on whole Invoice total amount

"GENERAL" if
discount on each line of item | VARCHAR(300) | NO | | "discountAmount" | 0.0 | TOTAL DISCOUNTED AMOUNT ON INVOICE | NUMERIC | NO | | "reference" | "39083a038d2940f78eca7931106d3c40" | REFUND_ID TO USE FOR PARTIAL_CANCELING | VARCHAR(50) | YES | | "itemCode" | "TXC005918138" | ITEM CODE UNIQUE | VARCHAR(50) | YES | | "expireDate" | "" | EXPIRE DATE OF ITEM IF EXIST | VARCHAR(45) | NO | | "description" | "Bowl" | ITEM NAME | VARCHAR(100) | YES | | "quantity" | 10.0 | ITEM QUANTITY | NUMERIC | YES | | "levyAmountA" | 2.05 | LEVY_AMOUNT ON NHIL | NUMERIC | YES | | "levyAmountB" | 2.05 | LEVY_AMOUNT ON GETFUND | NUMERIC | YES | | "levyAmountC" | 0.82 | LEVY_AMOUNT ON COVID | NUMERIC | YES | | "levyAmountD" | 0.0 | LEVY_AMOUNT ON CST | NUMERIC | YES | | "levyAmountE" | 0.0 | LEVY_AMOUNT ON TOURISM | NUMERIC | YES | | "discountAmount" | 0.0 | DISCOUNT ON ITEM | NUMERIC | NO | | "exciseAmount" | 10 | EXCISE DUTY ON ITEM | | | | "batchCode" | "5MAKD1" | BATCH NUMBER OPTIONAL | VARCHAR(100) | NO | | "itemCategory" | "" | "" - For STANDARD ITEM

"CST" - For CST ITEM

"TRSM" - For TOURISM ITEM

"EXM" - For ZERO RATED

"RNT" - RENT ITEM

"EXC_PLASTIC" - For PLASTIC & PLASTIC PRODUCT with Excise Duty | VARCHAR(50) | NO | | "unitPrice" | 10.0 | UNIT SELLING PRICE OF ITEM, EITHER INCLUSIVE OR EXCLUSIVE OF VAT | NUMERIC | YES | | "purchaseOrderReference" | "PO-230822-00001" | PURCHASE ORDER NUMBER | VARCHAR(50) | NO | | "taxType" | "FLAT" | "FLAT" or "STANDARD" | VARCHAR(20) | NO | **INVOICE RESPONSE** | **FIELD** | **LABEL** | **DESCRIPTION** | | --- | --- | --- | | "distributor_tin" | TIN | TIN of Taxpayer issuing the invoice | | "num" | Invoice Number | ERP/PoS Invoice Number as sent to the VSDC | | "ysdcid" | **SDC ID** | The unique identifier of the SDC (Sales Data Controller) issueing the E-VAT Signature | | "ysdcrecnum" | **Receipt Number** | The Receipt Number issued by the SDC | | "ysdcintdata" | **Internal Data** | References the Internal Data of the Invoice | | "ysdcregsig" | **Signature** | Invoice Signature | | "ysdcmrc" | MRC | Machine Registration Code | | "ysdcmrctime" | MRC Date & Time | Date/Time invoice is received at the backend | | "ysdctime" | **Date & Time** | Date/Time invoice is stamped | | "flag" | | Type of Invoice | | "ysdcitems" | **Line-Item Count** | Number of Line-Items on the invoice | | "qr_code": | | URL link to be converted to QR CODE | | "status": | | Status of invoice request | **CURRENCIES SUPPORTED** [https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1geCW7gk-LvHiAXQsigNDObDsFYCXS-pSGGBKQx78JkI/edit?usp=sharing](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1geCW7gk-LvHiAXQsigNDObDsFYCXS-pSGGBKQx78JkI/edit?usp=sharing)

request.description: Invoice Invoce (Normal Sale) refers to a receipt that shall be produced and offered to the client. It is any receipt produced while the Electronic Billing Machine is in its normal registration mode, used to register sales of goods and/or services, including corrections and discounts.

Invoice Invoce (Normal Sale) refers to a receipt that shall be produced and offered to the client. It is any receipt produced while the Electronic Billing Machine is in its normal registration mode, used to register sales of goods and/or services, including corrections and discounts.

item.description: This includes Partial and Full Refunds FULL REFUND A Full Refund refers to a situation where a customer receives complete reimbursement of the total amount they paid for a product or service. It means that the seller or service provider returns the entire purchase price to the customer. PARTIAL REFUND A Partial Refund refers to a situation where a customer receives a refund for only a portion of the total amount they paid for a product or service.

item.name: REFUND CANCELLATION
item.description: REFUND CANCELLATION A Refund Cancellation typically refers to the reversal or annulment of a previously issued refund. It occurs when a seller or service provider decides to nullify or revoke a refund that was previously processed and returned to the customer.

item.name: PURCHASE
item.description: PURCHASE A Purchase refers to the act of acquiring or obtaining goods or services in exchange for payment. You are required to record all purchases that you make revenue from, (including raw materials). For record purposes, this may also include other non-revenue purchases.

item.name: PURCHASE RETURN
item.description: PURCHASE RETURN A Purchase Return refers to the act of reversing or nullifying a previously made purchase. It occurs when a buyer or customer decides to cancel their order or transaction.

item.name: PURCHASE RETURN CANCELLATION
item.description: PURCHASE RETURN CANCELLATION A Purchase Return Cancellation refers to the reversal or nullification of a previously initiated return of goods or services. It occurs when a buyer or customer decides to cancel their request to return a purchased item or cancel a return process that was already initiated.

item.name: CREDIT NOTE/DEBIT NOTE
item.description:
CREDIT/DEBIT NOTE A Credit Note, also known as a Credit Memo, is a document issued by a seller or service provider to a customer as a form of credit or refund. It is typically provided when there is a need to rectify a previous transaction, such as returning goods, resolving a billing error, or providing compensation for a service issue. Whereas Refunds (Partial & Full) can only be done on a single invoice, Credit/Debit Notes are used in situations where the said refund/credit applies to multiple invoices. TAG DESCRIPTIONS | **TAG NAME** | **TAG VALUE EXAMPLE** | **TAG DESCRIPTION** | **LENGTH AND TYPE** | MANDATORY | | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | | "noteNumber" | "0948468491" | UNIQUE IDENTIFIER FOR CREDIT/DEBIT NOTE | VARCHAR(50) | YES | | "currency" | "GHS" | CURRENCY | VARCHAR(20) | YES | | "exchangeRate" | 1 | CURRENT EXCHANGE RATE: DEFAULT 1 FOR GHS | 10 | YES | | "noteAmount" | 200.0 | TOTAL AMOUNT ON CREDIT/DEBIT NOTE | NUMERIC | YES | | "userName" | "happy" | USER NAME | VARCHAR(100) | YES | | "calculationType" | "EXCLUSIVE" | "EXCLUSIVE", "INCLUSIVE" | VARCHAR(20) | NO
When omitted or left empty, "INCLUSIVE" is applied by default | | "flag" | "CREDIT_NOTE" | TRANSACTION TYPE: "CREDIT_NOTE", "DEBIT_NOTE" | VARCHAR(20) | YES | | "noteLineFlag" | "INVOICE" | "INVOICE" or "PURCHASE" | VARCHAR(20) | NO
When omitted or left empty, "INVOICE" is applied by defualt | | "businessPartnerName" | "James Kofi" | CLIENT NAME | VARCHAR(100) | YES | | "businessPartnerTin" | "VC00000009055" | CLIENT TIN NUMBER | VARCHAR(15) | YES B2B, NO B2C | | "groupReferenceId" | "2390957437" | REFERENCE ID TO A GROUP OF INVOICES | VARCHAR(50) | NO | | "transactionDate" | "2023-06-14" | DATE OF TRANSACTION | VARCHAR(50) | YES | | "remarks" | "" | REMARKS | VARCHAR(100) | NO | | "noteLines" | | LIST OF INVOICES DATA | YES | YES | | "invoiceNumber" | "2306219003" | INVOICE NUMBER - UNIQUE TRANSACTION IDENTIFIER | VARCHAR(100) | YES | | "invoiceAmount" | 100.0 | TOTAL AMOUNT ON THE INVOICE | NUMERIC | YES | | "invoiceDate" | "2023-06-14" | INVOICE DATE (POSTED DATE IS THE ONE USED) | VARCHAR(50) | YES |

item.name: STATEMENT OF ACCOUNT
item.description: STATEMENT OF ACCOUNT A Statement of Account is a summary of financial transactions and activity between a seller or service provider and a customer over a specific period. It is used to track the folio of a particular customer. **IMPLEMENTED FOR THE HOSPITALITY INDUSTRIES,** this allows for a single invoice (i.e.: a combination of all invoices from the PMS & PoS) to be printed at the end of a stay. **TAG DESCRIPTIONS** | **TAG NAME** | **TAG VALUE EXAMPLE** | **TAG DESCRIPTION** | **LENGTH AND TYPE** | MANDATORY | | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | | "currency" | "GHS" | CURRENCY | VARCHAR(20) | YES | | "exchangeRate" | 1 | CURRENT EXCHANGE RATE: DEFAULT 1 FOR GHS | 10 | YES | | "totalVat" | 13.04 | TOTAL VAT | NUMERIC | YES | | "totalAmount" | 100.0 | TOTAL AMOUNT | NUMERIC | YES | | "totalLevies" | 30 | TOTAL LEVY AMOUNT | NUMERIC | YES | | "userName" | "happy" | USER NAME | VARCHAR(100) | YES | | "businessPartnerName" | "James Kofi" | CLIENT NAME | VARCHAR(100) | YES | | "businessPartnerTin" | "VC00000009055" | CLIENT TIN NUMBER | VARCHAR(15) | YES B2B, NO B2C | | "groupReferenceId" | "2390957437" | REFERENCE ID TO A GROUP OF INVOICES | VARCHAR(50) | YES | | "transactionDate" | "2023-06-14" | DATE OF TRANSACTION | VARCHAR(50) | YES | | "groupInvoiceLines" | | LIST OF INVOICES DATA | | | | "transactionId" | "2306219003" | INVOICE NUMBER - UNIQUE TRANSACTION IDENTIFIER | VARCHAR(100) | YES | | "flag" | "INVOICE" | TRANSACTION TYPE: "INVOICE", "REFUND", "PARTIAL_REFUND", "CREDIT_NOTE", "DEBIT_NOTE", "REFUND_CANCELATION" | VARCHAR(20) | YES | | "invoiceVat" | 13.04 | TOTAL VAT OF THE INVOICE | NUMERIC | YES | | "invoiceAmount" | 100.0 | TOTAL AMOUNT ON THE INVOICE | NUMERIC | YES | | "invoiceLevies" | 25 | TOTAL LEVY AMOUNT ON THE INVOICE | NUMERIC | YES | | "transactionDate" | "2023-06-14" | INVOICE DATE (POSTED DATE IS THE ONE USED) | VARCHAR(50) | YES |

item.name: ERRORS
item.description:
Documentation for Errors

| **CODE** | **ERROR** | **DESCRIPTION** |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 403 | FORBIDDEN | When **Company Reference** in the URL does not match the Security_Key in the Header |
| 400 | BAD REQUEST | Invoice Number Already Signed |
|  | INVOICE_HAS_ALREADY_BEEN_SIGNED | E700 - The invoice has already been signed |
|  | INVOICE_WAS_NOT_FOUND | E701 - The invoice was not found |
